task: Define a Point struct with x and y as f64 fields, and write a function that creates a Point at the origin
Define a Color enum with Red, Green, Blue variants and a function that returns the name as a string
Define a Stack struct backed by a Vec of i32, with push, pop, and is_empty methods

tests.input: v s = Stack.new(); s.push(1); s.push(2); s.pop()

task: Define a Pair generic struct with two fields of the same type, and a swap function that returns a new Pair with swapped elements
Write a function that computes the distance squared between two Point structs

context.existing_code: S Point { x: f64, y: f64 }

task: Define a LinkedList node as an enum with Nil and Cons(i32, Box) variants, and a length function
Define a Counter struct using a HashMap that counts occurrences of strings

tests.input: v c = Counter.new(); c.add("a"); c.add("a"); c.get("a")

task: Define a Matrix struct for 2x2 matrices of f64, with an add method
Write a function that merges two sorted Vec<i32> into a single sorted Vec<i32>
Define a BinaryTree enum with Leaf and Node(i32, left, right) variants, and a sum function that totals all node values
Define a Range struct with start and end i32 fields, and a contains method
Write a function that reverses a Vec of i32 in-place using exclusive reference
Define a KeyValue generic struct with key: s and value: T, and a map_value method that transforms the value
Write a function that flattens a Vec of Vec of i32 into a single Vec of i32
Define a CircularBuffer struct of fixed capacity using a Vec, head index, and count, with push and peek methods

tests.input: v b = CircBuf.new(2); b.push(1); b.push(2); b.peek()
v b = CircBuf.new(2); b.push(1); b.push(2); b.push(3); b.peek()
